title: Frequently Asked
subtitle: Everything you need to know about SnapKaza's AI-powered property marketing.

items.question: Do I really only need my smartphone?
items.answer: Yes. SnapKaza's AI is specifically engineered to transform standard mobile photos into 4K luxury assets. You don't need expensive gear or professional photographers anymore.

items.question: How much can I save compared to traditional photography?
items.answer: A typical pro-shoot in the UK costs £300–£600 per listing. With our Essential Pack (£79) or Pro Pack (£179), you save up to 70% while getting more features like 3D rendering and AI Avatars.

items.question: What is the turnaround time for a full Elite Pack?
items.answer: While traditional editors take 48h+, SnapKaza delivers your visual enhancements, 3D staging, and AI-narrated videos in minutes. Go from 'just listed' to 'live' on the same day.

items.question: Is there a monthly subscription fee?
items.answer: No. We operate on a transparent Pay-per-Listing model. You only pay when you have a property to market. No contracts, no hidden fees.

items.question: Are the AI Avatars professional enough for luxury clients?
items.answer: Absolutely. Our avatars use high-fidelity voice-over technology designed for the premium market, acting as a 24/7 concierge that presents your property with consistent, high-end quality.
